home.tagline: Enter the night. Shape your lineage. Build your chronicle.

characters.title: Your characters
characters.createDisabledHint: You already have the maximum number of characters.
characters.empty: No characters yet. Create one when that flow is available.
characters.signInPrompt: Sign in to see your characters.

wizard.title: New character
wizard.name: Character name
wizard.clanSearchPlaceholder: Search by name, bloodline, or nickname…
wizard.noClans: No clans in the codex yet.

codexAside.emptyBody: Select the seal beside any label to open storyteller notes for that part of the sheet.

conceptSection.title: Character concept
conceptSection.body: This step anchors who the vampire was in life and how they read at the table. Name, concept, nature, demeanor, and clan together give Storytellers hooks for chronicle scenes and social conflict. Nothing here needs to be final prose—clear keywords beat a novel.

name.title: Character name
name.body: The name the chronicle uses for your Kindred. It can be mortal, courtly, a war-name, or a Requiem alias. Keep it pronounceable for other players; you can add epithets in the concept line.

concept.title: Concept
concept.body: A one-line hook: role plus tension. Examples: “penniless scholar who hears the dead” or “knight who broke every vow but one.” It tells the table what scenes you want and what bargains your character is built to break.

nature.title: Nature
nature.body: Archetype for the character’s true self—the drive they cannot sustain a lie against for long. When the mask slips, Nature is what remains. Pick something you will enjoy playing in moments of crisis.

demeanor.title: Demeanor
demeanor.body: The outward habit or mask: how they want to be read in polite company. Demeanor can contradict Nature; that gap is where intrigue and horror live.

findClan.title: Clan and bloodline
findClan.body: Clan is lineage, curse, and culture bundled together. It sets baseline Disciplines, stereotypes mortals whisper, and often the tone of your Hunger. Use search to jump to a bloodline, then the carousel to compare neighbors before you commit.

disciplinesPage.title: Disciplines
disciplinesPage.body: Powers of the blood will be catalogued here. For now, browse clans or return to your chronicle.

clansPage.title: Clan codex
clansPage.subtitle: Scroll the bloodlines recorded for this chronicle—parchment, weakness, disciplines, and a glimpse of clan art.
clansPage.empty: No clans are available in this chronicle yet.
clansPage.recordFallback: No chronicle synopsis is stored for this lineage yet.
clansPage.disciplineNoLore: Codex lore for this discipline is not loaded yet.
clansPage.noDisciplines: No baseline disciplines are assigned to this lineage in the chronicle tables.
clansPage.flipHint: Drag a corner or tap the arrows to turn the pages.

characterCard.deleteBody: This permanently removes the character from your chronicle. You can close this if you changed your mind.
